text.title: chain-of-thought Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for chain-of-thought as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using Extended Thinking on every query regardless of complexity.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Extended Thinking tokens are billed at output token rates (~$0.30/call at 4K thinking budget with Opus). Multiply by query volume. Reserve for tasks where reasoning quality matters more than cost.

failure-mode.description: Assuming thinking tokens are cached by Prompt Caching.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Prompt Caching applies to input tokens, not to Extended Thinking output. Thinking cost cannot be amortized across requests — it is paid fresh every call.

failure-mode.description: Running Self-Consistency on high-stakes automated pipelines without logging disagreement rate.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If >40% of samples disagree, majority vote is unreliable. Escalate to human review rather than returning a 3-2 majority answer.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All samples will produce identical reasoning paths at temperature=0, defeating the purpose of sampling diverse paths. Use temperature=0.7.
